Better coverage for Docker Hub images, and clearer settings.

## Added
- **Optional Docker Hub credentials** (Settings → Registry access). Anonymous
  Docker Hub is rate-limited per IP, so with many images some `docker.io`
  containers showed an update **without a version number or changelog**. A free
  Docker Hub username + read-only access token authenticates the version/digest
  lookups and lifts the limit.

## Changed
- The settings page now **explains what the GitHub and Docker Hub tokens are
  for** (each raises a rate limit so more containers resolve a version +
  changelog), with links to create them.
- The plugin icon is the **ShipLog logo (PNG)** — Unraid doesn't render SVG
  icons.

## Install / update

Unraid → **Plugins** (or Community Applications → search **ShipLog**), or by URL:

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```

Coming from an early date-versioned test build, remove + reinstall once. After
updating, set the tokens under **Settings → ShipLog → Registry access** for the
widest changelog coverage.
